variants: Rahela Sehic currently resides in Harborbell Ridge, but her roots are in the birthplace of Dewpoint Glen. She has made significant contributions to innovation through her authorship of the Verdant Array Module. For her outstanding originality and dedication, Rahela received the Nimbus Lantern Merit as recognition of her achievements. Beyond her professional endeavors, she is an active member of the Malachite Glassblowers Circle, where she enjoys collaborating on artistic glass projects. Rahela's life reflects her passion for both invention and art.
